note: Curated dealer showrooms with PUBLIC EV chargers. Coords geocoded by scrape_dealers.py.

dealers.name: Audi Hà Nội
dealers.address: 8 Phạm Hùng, Phường Mễ Trì (Yên Hòa), Quận Nam Từ Liêm
dealers.charger_notes: Public EV ONE charging station on-site: 1x DC fast charger 180 kW (CCS2) plus AC Type 2 (Mennekes). Operates 24/7, open to any EV brand (Audi, BMW, Mercedes, Porsche, etc.). Pricing ~7,900đ/kWh AC, ~9,900đ/kWh DC. Confirmed public.

dealers.name: Audi Hồ Chí Minh (Quận 1) / Audi Charging Lounge
dealers.address: 6B Tôn Đức Thắng, Phường Sài Gòn (Bến Nghé), Quận 1
dealers.charger_notes: EV ONE public charging station on-site: DC 180 kW (ABB, can charge 2 cars at once) plus 2x AC 11 kW. Co-located with the Audi Charging Lounge (550 m2, opened Apr 2023, daily 10:00-18:00). EV ONE listing marks it as part of the public network; the original Charging Lounge was Audi-customers-only, but the EV ONE network now lists this site as public.

dealers.name: Audi Tân Bình
dealers.address: Lô IV-22 đường Tây Thạnh, KCN Tân Bình, Phường Tây Thạnh, Quận Tân Phú
dealers.charger_notes: Largest Audi facility in Vietnam (9,000 m2). EV ONE public charging station on-site: DC fast charger 180 kW (ABB Terra 184), plus AC 22 kW wallboxes and a 24 kW DC wallbox in the service area. Listed in the EV ONE public network.

dealers.name: Audi City Phú Mỹ Hưng (Quận 7)
dealers.address: Tòa nhà Lavida Plus, 1183 Nguyễn Văn Linh, Phường Tân Phong, Quận 7
dealers.charger_notes: City showroom opened Mar 2024 at the Nguyễn Văn Linh – Nguyễn Hữu Thọ junction (~575 m2). EV ONE public fast charger up to 160 kW (Siemens). Confirmed public (a BYD was charged here per EV ONE). Note: one EV ONE source indicated this station was undergoing maintenance — verify availability before relying on it.

dealers.name: Audi Đà Nẵng
dealers.address: 86C Duy Tân, Phường Hòa Cường (Hòa Thuận), Quận Hải Châu
dealers.charger_notes: EV ONE public charging station on-site: DC fast charger 180 kW (ABB, Switzerland), in a 3,000 m2 outdoor area. Listed on PlugShare (location 706251) and in the EV ONE public network. Hours 8:00-19:00; after 19:00 contact staff. Confirmed public.

dealers.name: Bến Thành Ford (Chế Lan Viên)
dealers.address: 39 Chế Lan Viên, Phường Tây Thạnh, TP. Hồ Chí Minh
dealers.charger_notes: Strongest evidence of all dealers: Bến Thành Ford publicly announced installing a 120 kW DC fast charger at the showroom ahead of the Mustang Mach-E launch (CCS2). Listed as part of Ford VN's dealer charging network (Ford EV charging map / FordPass). Likely usable by EV-driving visitors at the showroom, though primary intent is Mach-E customers; access details should be confirmed by phone.

dealers.name: City Ford
dealers.address: 218 Quốc Lộ 13, Phường Hiệp Bình, TP. Hồ Chí Minh
dealers.charger_notes: News (NLD, tinxe.vn) reported Ford VN installed chargers at numerous HCMC-area authorized dealers first, ahead of the Aug 2025 Mach-E launch (CCS2, AC 11kW / DC 60kW). City Ford is one of the largest HCMC authorized dealers and part of the ~53-charger dealer network shown on Ford's public EV map / FordPass. Per-site charger and public access not individually confirmed — call to verify.

dealers.name: Sài Gòn Ford (Cao Thắng)
dealers.address: 61A Cao Thắng, Phường Bàn Cờ, TP. Hồ Chí Minh
dealers.charger_notes: Major HCMC authorized Ford dealer within the dealer charging network rolled out for the Mustang Mach-E (CCS2, AC 11kW / DC 60kW), per Ford VN's announcement of 53 dealer chargers shown on Ford's public EV map / FordPass. Specific per-site charger not individually confirmed in a single source — verify by phone.

dealers.name: Sài Gòn Ford - Nam Sài Gòn (Ford Nam Sài Gòn)
dealers.address: 161F Dạ Nam, Phường Chánh Hưng (Quận 8), TP. Hồ Chí Minh
dealers.charger_notes: Authorized HCMC Ford dealer; actively markets the Mustang Mach-E and is part of the dealer charging network (CCS2). Part of the ~53 dealer chargers on Ford VN's public EV map / FordPass. Per-site charger presence and public access not individually confirmed — verify by phone.

dealers.name: Ford Huế (Phước Thành Huế)
dealers.address: 595 Nguyễn Tất Thành, Phường Thany Thủy, TP. Huế
dealers.charger_notes: Ford Huế dealer site states the Ford EV charging network was deployed including its area; two EV ONE public chargers operate in Hue (Azerai La Residence, 5 Lê Lợi; ÊMM Huế, 17 Lý Thường Kiệt) usable by Mach-E owners. Dealer is part of the CCS2 charging rollout. Note: the confirmed public chargers in Hue are EV ONE partner sites, not necessarily on the dealer lot itself — confirm on-site charger by phone.

dealers.name: Geely Phú Mỹ Hưng
dealers.address: 54 Nguyễn Thị Thập, Phường Bình Thuận (Tân Thuận), Quận 7
dealers.charger_notes: CONFIRMED public charger (RabbitEVC station ID SGN59-45), live since mid-2025. Open to all EV brands via the RabbitEVC app at ~6,000đ/kWh (excl. VAT); Geely owners get an extra discount. One of the first 3 of 50 planned Geely x Rabbit EVC showroom chargers made public.

dealers.name: Geely Đà Nẵng
dealers.address: 286 Phạm Hùng, Hòa Phước, Hòa Vang
dealers.charger_notes: CONFIRMED public charger (RabbitEVC station ID DAD43-08), live since mid-2025. Public access for all EV brands via the RabbitEVC app. One of the first 3 of 50 planned Geely x Rabbit EVC showroom chargers made public.

dealers.name: Geely Hạ Long
dealers.address: Ô số 02 lô B, Khu đô thị mới phần mở rộng, đầu đường Tuần Châu, Phường Hà Khẩu, TP. Hạ Long
dealers.charger_notes: CONFIRMED public charger (RabbitEVC station ID QNH14-07), live since mid-2025. Public access for all EV brands via the RabbitEVC app. One of the first 3 of 50 planned Geely x Rabbit EVC showroom chargers made public.

dealers.name: BYD Oway Sài Gòn
dealers.address: 816 Sư Vạn Hạnh, Phường 12 (Hòa Hưng), Quận 10
dealers.charger_notes: On-site DC fast chargers 60-120 kW (CCS2) plus AC 7 kW (Type 2). Primarily for customers - many new buyers get free 24/7 charging for the first year. Confirmed via dealer site; treat as customers-first rather than fully open public.

dealers.name: BYD Sài Gòn (Võ Văn Kiệt)
dealers.address: 2094E Võ Văn Kiệt, Phường An Lạc, Quận Bình Tân
dealers.charger_notes: On-site DC fast charging ~120 kW (CCS2), described as open to both customers and the public, operating 24/7 at ~6,900 VND/kWh. Strongest public-charger evidence of the listed showrooms.

dealers.name: BYD Gia Định
dealers.address: 144/1 Quốc Lộ 1A (Đỗ Mười), Phường Thới An, Quận 12
dealers.charger_notes: Showroom/service center reported to have a 150 kW DC fast charger (~80% in 30 min), provided free for customers using service at the center (customers-only per source). Address also cited as 900 Quốc Lộ 1A, P. Thạnh Xuân, Q.12 in some listings.

dealers.name: BYD Harmony Sài Gòn
dealers.address: 619 Huỳnh Tấn Phát, Tân Thuận, Quận 7
dealers.charger_notes: 3S authorized dealer (sales, after-sales, parts). On-site charging is typical for BYD showrooms (destination charger for customers); no explicit public-vs-customer detail confirmed in sources - treat as customers/visitors at showroom.

dealers.name: BYD HTA Tây Hồ
dealers.address: 685A Lạc Long Quân, Phú Thượng, Quận Tây Hồ
dealers.charger_notes: Official BYD dealer per byd.com/vn/store. On-site destination charger is typical for BYD 3S/4S showrooms but specific public-vs-customer charger detail not confirmed in sources - treat as customers/visitors.

dealers.name: Volvo Hà Nội (Volvo Car Hà Nội)
dealers.address: Số 7-9 Nguyễn Văn Linh, Tổ 17, Phường Việt Hưng (Long Biên), Hà Nội
dealers.charger_notes: 120 kW DC fast charger, 1 charging post with 2 x DC CCS2 connectors. PUBLIC: operated on the Rabbit EVC commercial network, listed on PlugShare (station HAN29-23) and usable by any EV driver via the Rabbit EVC app with pay-per-use pricing (activation 20,000 points/session + 4,000 points per kWh). Volvo EV buyers get 1 year free; others pay. Strongest evidence of public access of all the Volvo sites (independent PlugShare + Rabbit EVC listing). Listed as active.

dealers.name: Volvo Car Đà Nẵng
dealers.address: 02 Nguyễn Hữu Thọ, Hải Châu, Đà Nẵng
dealers.charger_notes: 120 kW DC fast charger with 2 x DC CCS2 connectors, Rabbit EVC technology/network. PUBLIC: dealer page states drivers can locate the station and pay via the Rabbit EVC app (network shared with VinFast, BYD, Mercedes, etc.), not customers-only. Installed/announced 30 July 2025 and described as newly active.

dealers.name: Volvo Sài Gòn / Volvo Nam Sài Gòn (Quận 7)
dealers.address: 340 Nguyễn Văn Linh, Phường Tân Phong, Quận 7, TP. Hồ Chí Minh
dealers.charger_notes: 120 kW DC fast charger with 2 x DC CCS2 connectors on the Rabbit EVC network. PUBLIC: same Rabbit EVC spec and app-based pay-per-use access as the Hanoi and Da Nang Volvo stations (activation 20,000 points + 4,000 points/kWh). Slightly weaker direct evidence than Hanoi (no standalone PlugShare/dealer-specific page fetched), but multiple sources list it as a Rabbit EVC-equipped Volvo station. Believed active.

dealers.name: Wuling Bắc Từ Liêm (Hanoi)
dealers.address: Số 26 Cầu Diễn, Phường Phúc Diễn (now Phú Diễn), Quận Bắc Từ Liêm
dealers.charger_notes: Fascha DC fast charger, 30kW (also reported 60kW), 2 ports, connectors CCS2 + GBT. PUBLIC: listed on sacdien.net public charging directory, open 24/7, pay via Fascha app, ~4.5k-7k VND/kWh by time-of-day. Active/operational. Amenities: restroom, WiFi.

dealers.name: Wuling Hải Phòng
dealers.address: 26 Đường Vòng Cầu Niệm, Phường Nghĩa Xá, Quận Lê Chân
dealers.charger_notes: Fascha DC fast charger, 30kW, 2 ports (an earlier Fascha article cited a 20kW AC unit; current sacdien.net listing says DC 30kW x2). PUBLIC: listed on public charging directory, open 24/7, pay via Fascha app, 4.5k-7k VND/kWh. Active. Restroom + WiFi.

dealers.name: Wuling Khánh Hòa (Tây Nha Trang)
dealers.address: 779 Đường 23/10, Phường Tây Nha Trang (Xã Vĩnh Thạnh), Tp. Nha Trang
dealers.charger_notes: DC 60kW, 2 ports, one port GBT (Chinese standard). PUBLIC: listed on sacdien.net public directory, open 24/7, pay via QR code, 6k-8.9k VND/kWh by time-of-day. Active/operational. Restroom + WiFi.

dealers.name: Wuling Hưng Yên
dealers.address: Số 58 Nguyễn Văn Linh, Phường An Tảo (now Phố Hiến), TP. Hưng Yên
dealers.charger_notes: EVPAY DC 40kW, 2 ports. PUBLIC: listed on sacdien.net public directory, open 24/7, pay via EVPAY app, ~5.5k VND/kWh. Active. Note: requires EVPAY app (app-only) — open to any driver but app registration needed; listing context is a dealership so verify on arrival.

dealers.name: Wuling Thanh Hóa
dealers.address: 280 Bà Triệu, Phường Trường Thi (now Hạc Thành), TP. Thanh Hóa
dealers.charger_notes: DC 60kW, 2 ports. PUBLIC: listed on sacdien.net public directory, open 24/7, pay via bank QR transfer. Active/operational. Restroom + WiFi. Pricing not published on listing.
